summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 驅動的電力需求與數據中心基礎設施建設，公司營收創紀錄並上調財測，獲得市場高度看好。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Is Up 22.3% After Raising 2026 Outlook On Record Infrastructure Backlog
bullish.reason: 公司公布 2026 年第一季營收達 78.7 億美元，並因基礎設施訂單積壓創紀錄而上調全年財測，直接推動股價強勁上漲。

bullish.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $901
bullish.reason: 分析師 Manish A. Somaiya 維持「增持」評級，並將目標價大幅上調至 901 美元，反映市場對其長期成長潛力的信心。

bullish.title: Quanta (PWR): The Best Construction Stock for Data Center Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 強調 Quanta 在數據中心基礎設施領域的領先地位，受惠於 AI 產業對電力基礎設施的龐大需求。

bullish.title: Quanta Stock Climbs 36% in a Month: Should You Buy Now or Wait?
bullish.reason: 指出股價單月飆升 36%，歸因於 AI 驅動的電力需求與強勁的訂單積壓，顯示市場動能極強。

bullish.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in Quanta Services (PWR): Read This Before Placing a Bet
bullish.reason: 基於平均經紀商建議 (ABR)，市場普遍建議將該股納入投資組合，顯示機構投資人看好其後市。

bullish.title: Looking for a Growth Stock? 3 Reasons Why Quanta Services (PWR) is a Solid Choice
bullish.reason: 分析指出該公司具備強勁的成長屬性，預期將能持續超越市場表現。

bullish.title: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Quanta Services (PWR) is a Great Choice
bullish.reason: 從動能投資角度分析，認為 Quanta 具備成為頂尖動能股的條件。

bullish.title: The Smartest Energy Stocks to Buy With $1,000 Right Now
bullish.reason: 將 Quanta 列為能源領域首選標的，主要受惠於整體能源需求攀升的長期趨勢。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Quanta Services (PWR) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
neutral.reason: 探討在股價大幅上漲後，目前 750.73 美元的價位是否仍具備投資價值，屬於中性的價值評估討論。

neutral.title: Is Quanta Services (PWR) Stock Outpacing Its Construction Peers This Year?
neutral.reason: 單純比較 Quanta 與同業 Tutor Perini 的年度績效表現，屬於客觀的數據對比分析。
